query: Q-commerce fresh food trust benchmarks MENA region
source_detail: Web search: industry reports, competitor analysis

findings.content: Getir Turkey reports 40% of grocery GMV comes from fresh categories after introducing 'freshness or free' guarantee in 2025
MENA q-commerce fresh penetration averages 18% of basket, vs 35% in mature European markets
Carrefour Now (UAE) launched same-day fresh with temperature tracking in Q4 2025, claiming 2x repeat rate for fresh-first customers

summary: MENA fresh penetration in q-commerce (18%) significantly lags European markets (35%), indicating substantial growth headroom. Competitors who introduced freshness guarantees report meaningful uplift in fresh category share.
